title: Anatomy of an `egrep` Command with Regular Expressions
description: A flowchart deconstructing the components of an egrep command, showing how a regex pattern is matched against input text to produce filtered output, with common regex metacharacter examples.
elements: User Input Text (e.g., file or stream)
relationships: User provides Input Text to the egrep Command
egrep Command uses the Regular Expression Pattern
Pattern Matching Engine compares Pattern to each line of Input Text
Engine directs Matched Lines to stdout
Engine directs Non-Matched Lines to be discarded
